description: Letter from the copyist Shemuel to the notable Yeshuʿa. In Hebrew. Asking for a gift. During the six months in which Shemuel has stayed “here,” he lived on copying. Now he asks the notable to make the little collection needed in order to enable him to move on. (Information from Goitein’s index card.)
description_he: מכתב מהסופר שמואל אל הנכבד ישועה בעברית; בקשה למתנה לאחר 6 חודשי העתקה
